name: Western Union Money Order Only
description_short: San Antonio, TX: Western Union Money Order Only at 703 N Zarzamora St provides 24-hour money order and check-cashing services.
description_long:
Western Union Money Order Only operates 24/7 at 703 N Zarzamora St in San Antonio, TX. This standalone location serves residents and visitors seeking quick, reliable money order services in the heart of San Antonio. Whether you need to send funds or cash a check, you can visit anytime—day or night.

At this San Antonio location, you can send money orders, cash personal and payroll checks, and handle other money transfer needs. The staff is available around the clock at 210-433-9231 to assist with your transactions. This San Antonio location provides fast, convenient access to essential financial services.

Bring a valid government-issued ID for any transaction at this San Antonio, TX location. Money order services are typically quick and straightforward. Western Union Money Order Only specializes in fast, accessible money transfer solutions.
address: 703 N Zarzamora St, San Antonio, TX 78207

company_info.headquarters: 703 N Zarzamora St, San Antonio, TX 78207

pros: 24/7 online money sending capability through WU.com with in-store pickup based on agent hours
Extensive network with 150+ locations in San Antonio alone, including convenient retail partners (Walgreens, Circle K, QuikTrip, 7-Eleven, HEB)
Multiple payment methods accepted including cards and online accounts
Real-time transfer tracking available for customers
Multi-language support (English, Spanish, Haitian Creole, Chinese, French, Vietnamese)
Money order services available at multiple locations including several Circle K and convenience store branches
Established global brand with institutional credibility for international money transfers
cons: Service availability highly inconsistent—many locations offer only money orders while others restrict cash payouts to $300 maximum
Website experienced technical issues (Orange wallet temporarily unavailable) at time of data collection, suggesting potential system reliability concerns
Money transfer fees can be substantial and are not transparently displayed on the location finder page
Dependent on third-party retail agents means variable service quality and operating hours across the network
No direct company-owned locations visible in San Antonio—all services delivered through retail partners with their own policies
best_for: Customers sending international remittances to family or recipients in other countries
Individuals needing to purchase money orders at convenient retail locations
People who need 24/7 online money sending capability with retail pickup flexibility
Those with accounts at major retailers (Walgreens, HEB) who want integrated financial services
diagnosis: Western Union Money Order Only locations are best for customers needing basic check-cashing and money order services at convenient retail locations, or those sending international remittances through the extensive agent network. The primary caveat is that service capabilities vary dramatically by specific location—verify exact services (money orders vs. cash pickup vs. transfers) before visiting, and be prepared for potential $300 cash payout limits at some retail partners.
services: Online money sending (WU.com) with in-store pickup at agent locations
Cash pickup at retail agent locations
Money receiver management and delivery method updates
meta_description: San Antonio, TX: Western Union Money Order Only at 703 N Zarzamora St. Open 24/7 for money orders and check cashing.
